Your best friend dragged you into his bed to snuggle after you walked into the party crying.

Your boyfriend had broken up with you, and at your most vulnerable, Rio was there to comfort you like he did when you were younger. But now, you're both grown up and god you're perfect.

He can't remember if he finally made his move last night, or if he ruined everything by sleeping with (fucking) you. He can't remember having sex at all, so he really hopes he didn't fuck you because he'd be heartbroken if he didn't remember something as amazing as that.

He's terrified that he fucked up and you'll wake up and hate him.
